attr.title: SINGOU BREAKA シンゴウブレイカ
attr.desc: Look carefully at the red and blue signals, and DESTROY them. It's an eccentric action puzzle game where you destroy blocks modeled after pedestrian traffic lights.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam and copy all game files into the assets folder. You can also use the free demo version.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3506550/_SINGOU_BREAKA/) and copy all game files into the `assets` folder. You can also use the free demo version.
